commands.review_summary:
The PR updates iMessage outbound media sending to resolve direct targets for `send-attachment`, split captioned media into attachment-plus-text sends, add outbound handoff copy cleanup, and includes focused tests plus small qa-lab/plugin-SDK dependency/import fixes.

PR surface: Source +270, Tests +184, Config +1, Other +3. Total +458 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main only routes media-only explicit chat targets through `send-attachment`, while direct-handle and captioned media can still fall through to RPC `send` with `file`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can handle the mechanical handoff-safety and docs blockers; maintainer review is still needed for the intentional split-send caption behavior and extra SDK/qa-lab scope.
